case_title: SHALINA OSORIO VS. KATCHESS TEIXEIRA ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-16-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-16-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF SHALINA OSORIO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KATCHESS TEIXEIRA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MOSES TEIXEIRA IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY OSORIO, SHALINA AS TO DEFENDANT TEIXEIRA, KATCHESS TEIXEIRA, MOSES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-16-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED JAN-12-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TEIXEIRA, MOSES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVE) SERVED JAN-24-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TEIXEIRA, KATCHESS
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY OSORIO, SHALINA TEIXEIRA, KATCHESS TEIXEIRA, MOSES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OSORIO, SHALINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TEIXEIRA, KATCHESS TEIXEIRA, MOSES $4,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,075.00, PLAINTIFF HAS SUSTAINED HER BURDEN OF PROOF THAT SHE SUFFERED OUT-OF-POCKET EXPENSE AS A RESULT OF DEFENDANT'S NEGLIGENT OPERATION OF A MOTOR VEHICLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TEIXEIRA, KATCHESS TEIXEIRA, MOSES
